title: Small Business Saturday Proclamation Read at Juneau Assembly Meeting
summary: On Monday, November 18, 2024, Mayor Beth Weldon read the Small Business Saturday proclamation at the Regular Juneau Assembly Meeting. title: Thanksgiving city hall closure and trash pickup schedule changes
summary: The City of Cordova Refuse Department and City Hall will be closed on Thursday, November 28th, and Friday, November 29th. Trash collection will not occur on these days.
